# [Ontological Fallback Chains](pillars/1_graph_orchestration/ORCH-1.14-Ontological_Fallback_Chains.md) (CONCEPT:ORCH-1.14)

## Overview
Uses the KG to find fallback models dynamically rather than relying on static lists during rate limits.
